_note: Hand-editable annotations merged into METRICS.md by month. Add real, dated milestones: hazard events (Kona storm, vog episode), product launches (App Store, Morning Brief), media mentions. type ∈ {product, hazard, media}. Never fabricate dates — leave unknown ones out.
